.i have been dealing with him and saved me a lot of money and over all saved me a lot of headaches…i recommend him
Love the service, I do recommend it
Mr. Feliciano helped me with my legal case; I highly recommend him.

This law office is both unethical and unprofessional. They go to hearings unprepared every time. Mr Shinton would be on his phone not paying attention to what you say and he just charges.
He charged me for a whole case of appeal then he dismissed it without even telling me. When my opposing party got the news he contacted me and when I called the office they denied that they dismissed the case. I had another office look up the records and I was shocked when I saw on the court documents that it was dismissed by them.
When I texted him he was making unethical excuses.
In another event I had hearings and I was in court when his office called and said the hearings were cancelled. I saw the opposing party going to the court room . I asked the officer and confirmed that I have a hearing.
I called back to office and they sent me another attorney who doesn’t know anything about the situation.
I lost a lot of money because of this office and their unethical and unprofessional conduct.

Mr. Shinton has been an incredible attorney to work with. My case was extremely complex, emotionally charged, and beyond draining. It involved the passing of my mama, an incomplete living trust, as well as conservatorship of my dementia father and my special needs brother. He worked diligently to protect my brother and my father, honor my parents wishes, and deliver justice to my difficult case. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for standing with me through the most difficult challenges of my life. My father, my brother and I are grateful for you. Hands-down, Mr. Shinton is a lawyer that you want on your side.

Mr. Shinton is my life savior. I hired him because I just wanted a lawyer to get it done with my case and move on regardless of the outcome but Mr. Shinton demonstrated that he really take cares of his clients and fight for the rights. He is very calm and very professional. His dedication to my case is commendable. He is one of the best lawyer one can have trust me!!
Very satisfied I got my papers I recommend them they work very well
Amazing Attorney and works hard for his clients.

reviews.text:
I’ve known Attorney Marc for years, and I can’t recommend him and his team enough. They helped my whole family through the entire process of getting their green cards  eventually their citizenship.

On a personal level, they also guided me step-by-step through DACA and now my green card. Marc was also there with me during my green card interview, which made the whole experience so much better and helped calm my nerves.

Marc is kind, honest, and always tells you the truth, even when it’s not what you want to hear. He truly puts in the effort to get the best results for all his clients.

I can’t say enough good things about Susana. I’ve worked with her for years, and she’s been the heart of this process. She is incredibly knowledgeable, organized, and always quick to respond. No matter how many questions I had (and I had a lot!), she answered them with patience and kindness. She truly goes above and beyond to make sure you feel informed every step of the way. She made the process feel manageable. I’m truly grateful I had Susana part of my cases.

If you’re looking for a legal team that’s professional, experienced, and genuinely cares, this is the one to trust. Thank you, Attorney Marc and team!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you and congratulations!

reviews.text:
Nov 2023, I chose to take leave after a long military deployment. Unfortunately, my leave was disrupted by a driver who chose to drink, drive and rear ended my family and I. As I was sitting in the hospital waiting room waiting for my mother and daughter to be seen I knew we needed someone to represent us. I deep dive into the internet reading reviews on several local attorneys.
I soon found Marc. All the reviews seemed genuine. I sent him and several others that passed my screening. First thing the following morning I had a message from his office offering an appointment as soon as the same day. He showed patience, compassion and understanding. There was no doubt in my mind that he was my guy.
Soon after I went on deployment and he worked with me even through the difficulties of having to find me medical attention out of state and sometimes having no comms with me.
At the time of settling with the insurance company, I have no doubt that he was aggressively fighting for us.
I don’t think that we would have had the outcome we had had it been another attorney.
If you need an attorney who cares and is willing to go above and beyond to look out for your best interest don’t waste your time with anyone else. Marc is your guy!
reviews.ownerResponse: Ana, thank you so much for your review. It was a honor to assist you and your family.

reviews.text:
In June 2023, my husband and I hired the excellent professional services of attorney Karlin and his legal team for our citizenship application. Thank God everything was a success!  In September 2023, our citizenship was approved.
We thank Alexandra, Paralegal, who helped us throughout the entire process. She is a very professional and kind young lady who kept us informed and assisted us all the step of the way.      We thank attorney Jessie for representing us during our interview, she was very helpful. She is a professional attorney with a kind heart. We are very happy and we are very satisfied with all their services. We recommend Karlin & Karlin, an excellent legal team.

REVIEW IN SPANISH:
In the month of June 2023, my husband and I hired the excellent professional services of attorney Karlin and his legal team for our citizenship application. Thank God everything was a success! In the month of September 2023, my husband and I obtained the approval of our citizenship.
We are grateful to Alexandra, our paralegal, who assisted us throughout the entire process. She is a very kind and professional young woman who kept us informed and supported us every step of the way. We also thank attorney Jessie for her representation during our interview; she was extremely helpful. Jessie is a very professional and kind-hearted lawyer. We are very happy and satisfied with her services. We highly recommend Karlin & Karlin, an excellent legal team.

reviews.text: I loved the service I received; everything was very well explained and everyone was very friendly. They answered all my questions and I felt completely at ease. 😊 Thank you so much!

reviews.text: Excellent service, I highly recommend them.

reviews.text: Unbelievable outcome I am very happy they helped me with my case. Sadly I got injured but  i definitely recommend Sheriff A Issa as the attorney. Beautifully settlement
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words! We're truly sorry you had to go through such a tough situation, but we're glad we could help you achieve a positive outcome. Your recommendation means a lot to us. If you ever need anything in the future, don’t hesitate to reach out. Wishing you a smooth recovery!

reviews.text: This law firm made the intake process very easy and took the time to answer all my questions. I feel confident that the Alvandi Law Group will take good care of me!
This group helped me with all my questions that I had and got the job done! Would definitely recommend
Good job
They are great and super helpful. A great group with a bunch of knowledge that helped my family out.

I just spoke with a girl named Mia and she was extremely kind / knowledgeable. I am young with no experience as far as opening up a workers comp case and she made me feel comfortable by letting me know my options, some of which i had no idea about before speaking with her. She was on top of it

I was referred to Alvandi Law Group , although I couldn't benefit from their services, because I live in a different state. Evan tried his best to help me , he and the company showed genuine care and provided me with resources in my area. Their compassion and willingness to help left a lasting impression on me. I highly recommend reaching out to them if you are in need of assistance.

I highly recommend the team at Alvandi Law Group for their legal expertise and compassionate approach to client representation. They always demonstrated exceptional professionalism and their expertise and commitment made me feel well-supported throughout the entire process.
Alvandi Law Group. The ones who handled my claim & thx too  David, Monica, Judith and Arezoo. Thx

Dear Alvandi Law Group, thank you so much for going above and beyond! I am extremely grateful for all of your help and bearing with me through everything! I can only hope your reflections of me can be seen by others. I truly hope you guys have an abundance of success this year and I hope you enjoyed your new years!
I had a really good experience with the Alvandi Law Group. They were really compassionate in helping me by taking care of everything.
Could not have asked for a better experience than the one I had at Alvandi. They were professional, caring, and made sure I got the results I needed.

So glad I came across them! They were so patient and answered all of my questions. I’m confident that the Alvandi Law Group will handle my case and get me the results I’m looking for. Really at ease now!
Alvandi Law Group was great. Their intake team was attentive and helped me understand my options. They even provided me a referral to a firm that could help me with my case. Great customer service!
I had a great experience working with the Alvandi Law Group! They provided professional and timely advice. I would recommend them to anyone seeking this type of support.

Alvandi Law Group was excellent to work with. They listened to my issues and gave me good solid positive solutions and plans of action. I  look forward to working with them again.
Randi Paldi

This law firm's zero fee guarantee, and years of experience is what made me call the Alvandi Law Group. Their expertise in workers comp, combined with a promise to only charge if they win your case, speaks volumes about their confidence. I feel well taken care of with the Alvandi Law Group.

Had an excellent experience with staff at Alvandi Law!  The team was very courteous with my time and gave us a sense of direction during this challenging time in my family.  Thanks again for Evan and team for your amazing service!

I had reached out to the Law firm for some consultation, they were pretty patient with me, I felt heard and understood by the individual I was speaking with. I enjoyed how polite and kind my interactions were.
I am glad I found this Law Firm. Very good information. I found you guys on TikTok. Glad you were able to help my brother out. Thanks Kayla.

Found this place on Tiktok. I follow Kayla La Angelina. She was very helpful with her video tips on what we need to know as employees.  Thanks to her tips I was able to help for my friend. I knew exactly what to tell my friend to do. My friend signed up with you. Thank you Kayla for all your valuable information and support.

Professional, courteous, caring, and knowledgeable. During a time of lots of stress and unease they walked me through the process and gave me confidence that everything will turn out ok! Highly recommend!!!

Normally, I don’t really write reviews but this one felt necessary. I called Alvandi Law Group after seeing their law firm advertised on Google. I was in an accident and the person that answered my call was very attentive and knowledgeable and even though they were unable to help me, I still felt that they were very helpful and provided me with a lot of resources that I am really grateful for.

My experience was very positive, the representative that assisted me was knowledgeable and sympathized with my situation. I was very impressed with his ability to retain the information that I was giving him and to respond in kind with the answers I needed , definitely will recommend to family and friends if they should need your services.

I was overwhelmed with decisions I needed to make with my situation and I was referred to Alvandi law group! and it was the best decision I made! I was helped by Kayla and she not only helped me with my case she was able to answer any and all questions I had and gave me peace of mind.

My sister had referred this place to me and ever since I started working with them, I have received great customer service. They provide any information and updates as soon as possible and answer all questions. Highly recommend.
I called to get information and they were very polite, all my questions were answered. Their customer service is great.

Unfortunately, I have experienced a few accidents in my work life . But, in each of them, I was able to turn to Alvandi for calm, sure guidance. Since each of these was a very troubling time for me--for different reasons--their knowledge of the law and the system were invaluable. Thank you, Alvandi!
